articles.title: Jayson Tatum (left knee stiffness) will miss Game 7 against Philadelphia
articles.description:
"He came in today with knee discomfort we decided - the medical team and myself decided for him not to play," Mazzulla said.

The post Jayson Tatum (left knee stiffness) will miss Game 7 against Philadelphia appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Update: Jayson Tatum (left knee stiffness) will miss Game
